templates.name: Quote Step Page
templates.description: Standard page layout for each step in the Quote to Buy flow. Every step follows this template: Progress Banner at top spanning full width, Stepper Navigation fixed on the left, form content centred, and optional Mascot Tip in the right gutter.

layout.responsive: On mobile, stepper collapses to a step counter bar, mascot tip moves inline above the relevant form field

rules: Every step must have a Progress Banner showing 'Step X of 5' and the step title
Stepper Navigation must show all steps with completed (green checkmark), current (highlighted), and upcoming (grey) states
Form content is single column, maximum width 640px, centred in the content area
Only one Primary Button per step — always labelled with the action (Next, Get my quote, Continue to purchase)
Mascot Tip appears at most once per step, positioned next to the most complex decision on that page
Alert Banners for coverage limitations appear immediately after the form field that triggered them

changelog.description: Template cross-referenced with updated component code files and design token exports

templates.name: My Account Page
templates.description: Standard page layout for all My Account sections. Fixed sidebar navigation on the left, breadcrumb trail above the content area, main content on the right. Used for dashboard, product details, personal details, and all sub-pages.

layout.responsive: On mobile, sidebar becomes a hamburger menu overlay, breadcrumb simplifies to a back arrow with parent page name

rules: Sidebar must always be visible on desktop — it is the primary navigation for My Account
Active section in sidebar must be highlighted with a left border indicator
Breadcrumb must reflect the full navigation depth (Home > My Products > Home Insurance)
Dashboard layout follows the Dashboard Layout pattern
Sub-pages use a single-column content layout with section headings

changelog.description: Template cross-referenced with updated component code files and design token exports

templates.name: Quote Result Page
templates.description: The 'Your Quote' page layout showing the generated insurance quote. Displays the quote summary with pricing, coverage details grid, optional cover add-ons, and purchase action.

regions: Quote Summary Card (centre, top of content)

rules: Quote Summary Card must appear at the top of the content area with the price prominently displayed
Monthly price is the default display — annual price shown as secondary option
Coverage Grid shows what is included in the policy in a 3-column layout
Optional covers appear below the coverage grid with toggle switches
The 'Buy now' Primary Button and 'Save quote' Secondary Button appear at the bottom
If the user adjusts the excess, the price should update immediately (not require a save/recalculate)

changelog.description: Template cross-referenced with updated component code files and design token exports
